channel.title: Extra on Biblioteca Maratona UFMG
channel.description: Recent content in Extra on Biblioteca Maratona UFMG

item.title: debug.cpp
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: debug.cpp Código link void debug_out(string s, int line) { cerr << endl; } template<typename H, typename... T> void debug_out(string s, int line, H h, T... t) { if (s[0] != ',') cerr << "Line(" << line << ") "; do { cerr << s[0]; s = s.substr(1); } while (s.size() and s[0] != ','); cerr << " = " << h; debug_out(s, line, t...); } #ifdef DEBUG #define debug(.

item.title: fastIO.cpp
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: fastIO.cpp Código link int read_int() { bool minus = false; int result = 0; char ch; ch = getchar(); while (1) { if (ch == '-') break; if (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9') break; ch = getchar(); } if (ch == '-') minus = true; else result = ch-'0'; while (1) { ch = getchar(); if (ch < '0' || ch > '9') break; result = result*10 + (ch - '0'); } if (minus) return -result; else return result; }

item.title: hash.sh
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: hash.sh Código link # Para usar (hash das linhas [l1, l2]): # bash hash.sh arquivo.cpp l1 l2 sed -n $2','$3' p' $1 | sed '/^#w/d' | cpp -dD -P -fpreprocessed | tr -d '[:space:]' | md5sum | cut -c-6

item.title: makefile
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: makefile Código link CXX = g++ CXXFLAGS = -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -Wall -Wshadow -std=c++17 -Wno-unused-result -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-char-subscripts #-fuse-ld=gold

item.title: pragma.cpp
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: pragma.cpp Código link // Otimizacoes agressivas, pode deixar mais rapido ou mais devagar #pragma GCC optimize("Ofast") // Auto explicativo #pragma GCC optimize("unroll-loops") // Vetorizacao #pragma GCC target("avx2") // Para operacoes com bits #pragma GCC target("bmi,bmi2,popcnt,lzcnt")

item.title: rand.cpp
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: rand.cpp Código link mt19937 rng((int) chrono::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count()); int uniform(int l, int r){ uniform_int_distribution<int> uid(l, r); return uid(rng); }

item.title: stress.sh
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: stress.sh Código link P=a make ${P} ${P}2 gen || exit 1 for ((i = 1; ; i++)) do ./gen $i > in ./${P} < in > out ./${P}2 < in > out2 if (! cmp -s out out2) then echo "--> entrada:" cat in echo "--> saida1:" cat out echo "--> saida2:" cat out2 break; fi echo $i done

item.title: template.cpp
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: template.cpp Código link #include <bits/stdc++.h> using namespace std; #define _ ios_base::sync_with_stdio(0);cin.tie(0); #define endl '\n' typedef long long ll; const int INF = 0x3f3f3f3f; const ll LINF = 0x3f3f3f3f3f3f3f3fll; int main() { _ exit(0); }

item.title: timer.cpp
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: timer.cpp Código link // timer T; T() -> retorna o tempo em ms desde que declarou using namespace chrono; struct timer : high_resolution_clock { const time_point start; timer(): start(now()) {} int operator()() { return duration_cast<milliseconds>(now() - start).count(); } };

item.title: vimrc
item.description: Sobre linkLink original: vimrc Código link "" vimrc "" { set ts=4 sw=4 mouse=a nu ai si undofile function H(l) return system("sed '/^#/d' | cpp -dD -P -fpreprocessed | tr -d '[:space:]' | md5sum", a:l) endfunction function P() range for i in range(a:firstline, a:lastline) let l = getline(i) call cursor(i, len(l)) echo H(getline(search('{}'[1], 'bc', i) ? searchpair('{', '', '}', 'bn') : i, i))[0:2] l endfor endfunction vmap <C-H> :call P()<CR> "" }
